task_description: Build the complete brand and visual identity system for the Quant Ecosystem in packages/brand/ and docs/brand/. Add missing apps (Maps, Photos), 6-theme system, Indic typography, WCAG contrast utilities, ~100 core icons, app icon set generation, per-app logos, and brand guidelines documentation.

verification.summary: typecheck passes with zero errors, all 33 tests pass, lint clean. Tests cover contrast utilities, theme accessibility (AA for all foreground/background, primary, accent, destructive pairs; AAA for highContrast), icon library counts, app icon set generation, and logo completeness. Three review iterations conducted - all issues resolved, final verdict APPROVED.
